---
title: "Ann Arbor's Vertex Cafe Pride Menu"
date: 2026-07-01
description: "Vertex Pride Menu. Five specialty drinks, each named after an LGBTQ+ historical figure, including Bo Laurent"
image: /images/vertex_menu.jpg
image-alt: "Vertex Pride Menu. Five specialty drinks, each named after an LGBTQ+ historical figure, including Bo Laurent."
categories: [news, intersex]
---

Spotted at Vertex Coffee Roasters in Ann Arbor (and [posted on their Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/p/DZuFV1YsrGj/))

![](/images/vertex_menu.jpg){fig-alt="Vertex Pride Menu. Five specialty drinks, each named after an LGBTQ+ historical figure, including Bo Laurent." width="540"}
